content.en:
"The ultimate level of Wanfa Chonggong has finally been deduced!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Once he condenses the ultimate level of Wanfa Chonggong, his strength will soar, and the speed of cultivation will also be accelerated. At that time, there will be no problem in fighting across six or seven major realms.

Immediately, he transmitted the ultimate Chonggong technique to another time and space.

After a period of time, this ultimate Chonggong technique was successfully transmitted to the clone of another time and space line.

...

Wanchong Mountain.

Waiyue Ancient City.

Ye Tian received the ultimate level of Wanfa Chonggong technique transmitted by the original body, and immediately began to rebuild Wanfa Chonggong.

After a period of time, Wanfa Chonggong was successfully reshaped and reached the ultimate level of Chonggong, and his aura became more terrifying and his strength was much stronger.

After that, he used his body to deduce the ultimate Chonggong secret method, and also perfected the extreme blood armor, extreme blood blade, and extreme blood escape to the ultimate Chonggong secret method level.

It took him some time to successfully perfect the ultimate Chonggong secret method, and he spent some time to cultivate these three ultimate Chonggong secret methods to the perfect state.

At this time, his cultivation had reached the 21st heaven, but his real combat power reached the 27th heaven or even the 28th heaven.

In other words, the strongest of the Ten Thousand Churches were no longer his opponents.

That day.

Ye Tian sneaked into the most core layer of the Ten Thousand Churches, the library of martial arts books, and no one found it. Here he browsed the most precious books of the Ten Thousand Churches and learned the true secrets of the Chonggong system.

"After practicing the Chonggong system to the 36th level, one must comprehend the ultimate Chonggong rules and enter the ultimate realm, also known as the Ultimate Palace Master. The top existence in this time and space line is called the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master, and the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master should be equivalent to the level of the Ultimate Supreme of the Extreme Dao in my time and space line."

"But how many Eternal Ultimate Palace Masters are there in this time and space line, the small Wanjiao Church does not know!"

Ye Tian now knows the final achievement of the cultivation system of this time and space line, and he has a little confidence in his heart.

There should be no Eternal Ultimate Palace Master on the Wanchong Mountain side, but he is not sure whether there is an Ultimate Palace Master.

If there is a force that has an Ultimate Palace Master, then the most likely one is the first force in Wanchong Mountain - Leiyu Palace!

Leiyu Palace is the most mysterious and powerful force in Wanchong Mountain. There are many practitioners above the 20th level, and other forces dare not provoke Leiyu Palace.

So, Leiyu Palace may have an Ultimate Palace Master!

Of course, this is just Ye Tian's guess. He doesn't know the specific situation.

That day.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian used the resources of the Wanjiao Society to quickly improve his strength. Unknowingly, he raised his cultivation to the 25th level.

At this time, even with the ultimate Chonggong technique, his cultivation level was still improving very slowly, mainly becauseThe Nine Dragons Golden Pill was completely useless to him.

Under normal circumstances, the Nine Dragons Golden Pill was of little help to cultivators above the 23rd Heaven. He was able to quickly ascend to the 25th Heaven because the Wanfa Chonggong was too amazing.

But now, he had no resources, and it was too difficult to improve his cultivation, unless he relied on a long period of time to improve it little by little, but that would be too time-consuming.

"The Nine Dragons Golden Pill is too weak. I need a better Chonggong Golden Pill, that is, an intermediate Chonggong Golden Pill, not a low-level Chonggong Golden Pill like the Nine Dragons Golden Pill."

The Wanjiao Society did not have the secret recipe for the intermediate Chonggong Golden Pill. If it had, the Wanjiao Society's strength would definitely be able to reach a higher level.

...

Waiyue Ancient City.

Inside the Black Soul Pavilion.

Ye Tian came here, and he made an appointment with a cultivator of the 21st Heaven——Ghost Elder. The reason why he looked for this Ghost Elder was because this Ghost Elder's identity was very mysterious, and he could get anything as long as he paid enough.

"What do you want?"

Ghost Elder saw Ye Tian and asked.

"Secret recipe of intermediate Chonggong Jindan!"

Ye Tian said.

"You want the secret recipe of intermediate Chonggong Jindan?"

Ghost Elder was a little surprised. This was not an ordinary thing. It was a very precious thing in the whole Wanchong Mountain. Only the top forces had it.

"Can you get it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, but what can you take out?" Ghost Elder said with a smile.

He was not strong enough, but he had a big backer and many channels. As long as there was enough interest, he could get the secret recipe of intermediate Chonggong Xuanjindan.

Swish!

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a dense mass of low-level heavy palace golden pills emerged.

Gui Lao took a look at it and didn't take it seriously. After all, they were just some low-level heavy palace golden pills. What's the point of having so many of them? But he was soon shocked.

"Are these all low-level heavy palace golden pills of 100% purity?"

Gui Lao took a breath.

"Yes, you should understand the value of low-level heavy palace golden pills of 100% purity. They can quickly improve the cultivation of practitioners below the 23rd heaven without any side effects. They are rare in the world and cannot be bought by the outside world!" Ye Tian said.

"Are you a secret master?"

Gui Lao asked tentatively.

"This doesn't seem to be within the trading range, right?" Ye Tian asked back.

Gui Lao stopped asking and said, "These low-level Chonggong Jindan can be exchanged for the secret recipe of the intermediate Chonggong Jindan. Come back after three Chonggong years."

"Okay!"

Ye Tian agreed and left immediately.

Just after Ye Tian left, a figure appeared. His aura far exceeded that of Gui Lao. He was a cultivator of the 27th Heaven.

"Prisoner, this cultivator is likely to be a secret master who can refine a low-level Chonggong Jindan with 100% purity, but with his level, why doesn't he join some top forces, so that he can easily get the secret recipe of the intermediate Chonggong Jindan." Gui Lao asked in confusion.

"It's very simple.But, either he has offended a powerful existence and dares not show up, or he is unwilling to join other forces. "Qiu Zun said.

"Qiu Zun, do we really want to collect the secret recipe of intermediate Chonggong Jindan for him?" asked Gui Lao.

"Collect, this transaction is also worthwhile for us! By the way, we can sell his information to other forces and make a lot of money!" said Qiu Zun with a smile.

"Qiu Zun is wise!"

Gui Lao nodded.

In a blink of an eye, three Chonggong years passed.

This day.

Ye Tian came here again and met Gui Lao.

Gui Lao took out the secret recipe of intermediate Chonggong Jindan, and Ye Tian also took out a large amount of 100% pure low-level Chonggong Jindan to complete the transaction with him.

Yunwu Jindan

He was sure that there was no problem with the secret recipe, so he put it away.

"Happy cooperation! ”

Ghost Taoist.

After Ye Tian left, the information about him was sold by Ghost Taoist and his friends.

A secret master who can refine a low-level Chonggong Golden Pill with 100% purity is a popular commodity. Although Ye Tian has hidden his identity and no one knows where he comes from, he is definitely not one of the top forces in Wanchong Mountain, so they dare not offend him..
